name: Tile > Backsplash - Remove & Replace
basis: Per SQ FT. Demo old backsplash tile then set + grout new; small vertical area so high min/SF, mid-grade tile+thinset+grout ~$8/SF. Old tile hauled. Handyman-legal.
sources: Anchor 'Tile, Backsplash, Install/Repair' $240/120min/$40 (per-job); Homewyse tile install $16-20/SF, ceramic labor $4-6/SF

name: Tile > Grout - Install New
basis: Per SQ FT. Grout freshly set tile field, float + sponge + haze; ~4min/SF, grout ~$2/SF. Handyman-legal.
sources: Anchor 'Tile, Grout Matching And Application' $120/60min/$20 (per-job); grout float+sponge per SF

name: Tile > Grout - Regrout
basis: Per EACH (small area/job). Rake out old grout + reapply matching grout; heavier than fresh grout due to removal. Handyman-legal.
sources: Anchor 'Tile, Grout Matching And Application' $120/60min/$20; regrout adds grout-rake removal step

name: Tile > Install New - Ground Up
taxonomy_path: Labor > Tile > Install New - Ground Up
basis: Per SQ FT. Lay + set floor/wall tile in thinset, level & grout; ~8min/SF, mid-grade tile+thinset+grout ~$6/SF. Handyman-legal finish.
sources: Anchor 'Tile, Floor, Install/Repair' $240/120min/$40; Homewyse ceramic floor tile $16.38-20.21/SF, labor $4-6/SF, material $1-4/SF

name: Tile > Repair - Replace Individual Tile
taxonomy_path: Labor > Tile > Repair - Replace Individual Tile
basis: Per SQ FT. Chisel out cracked tile, clean bed, set + grout match; very high min/SF for small patch. Handyman-legal.
sources: Anchor 'Tile, Floor, Install/Repair' $240/120min/$40; single-tile pop-out & reset is slow per SF

name: Tile > Seal Tile & Grout
basis: Per EACH (per-area/job). Clean & apply penetrating sealer to tile + grout; direct anchor match. Handyman-legal.
